description_long: This is a small pedestrian bridge with a gently arched deck and prominent red railings. The bridge features two sets of vertical posts at each end, topped with decorative finials, and curved horizontal rails connecting them. The walking surface consists of dark wooden planks arranged perpendicular to the length of the bridge, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The railings are painted a deep red, contrasting with the dark, almost black, wooden deck. The overall design is reminiscent of classic Japanese garden bridges, with a focus on both function and ornamental detail. The structure appears suitable for parks, gardens, or urban green spaces, providing both passage and aesthetic value.
description: A small, arched pedestrian bridge with red decorative railings and a dark wooden plank deck, reminiscent of traditional Japanese garden bridges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entryway, vertical posts with finials, and the width of the dark wooden deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gentle arch of the bridge and the full length of the red railings.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite entry and the symmetry of the posts and railings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again displaying the arch and railing design from the other side.
attribute_railing_design: painted wood railings with curved horizontal bars and vertical posts topped with decorative finials
